title: Maidsoul Kitchen
description: A touhoulittlemaid addon mod, is designed to teach maids how to use other mods for cooking and farming.
body:
!!!Warning!!!

The project is in a semi-abandoned state. If you plan to use this module as one of the main modules, please consider it carefully!
Of course, suggestions are still welcome, just be prepared for the worst outcome, or else you might get tripped up by me.

A [touhou little maid](https://modrinth.com/mod/touhou-little-maid) addon mod, is designed to teach maids how to use other mods for cooking and farming.

Now, the maid has learned to use kitchen utensils from other mods to cook.

Imagine, when you return from an expedition, the maid has already "prepared" dinner for you; when you go out on an expedition, you enjoy the food made by the maid with your own hands, what a wonderful thing it is. At the same time, the maid can also be self-sufficient, eating the meals cooked by their chef, and no longer will they starve along with their master!

Currently support mods：[Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)、[Miner's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/miners-delight)、[Youkai's Homecoming](https://modrinth.com/mod/youkaishomecoming)、[Crock Pot](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/crock-pot)、[Drink Beer](https://modrinth.com/mod/drink-beer-refill)、[B&C Fan-Made 1.20 Port](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bnc-1-20-port)、[Kitchen Karrot](https://modrinth.com/mod/kitchen-karrot)

Other mod interactions are also in progress! If you have any modules you want to interact with, you can let me know through [Kitchen Mod Support](https://github.com/Wall-ev/MaidsoulKitchen/issues/6)!
